assertions.title: List Type Conversion

steps.action: Create preset with list type parameter
steps.observed: Preset g4-list-test created successfully with ids:list parameter

steps.action: Run preset with CSV list value
steps.expected: Query execution with IN clause generated

assertions.issues: Cannot verify IN clause generation without database connection. Parameter validation passed (no SQL injection detected for value '1,2,3'), but query execution requires a database connection.

assertions.title: String Escaping - Quotes

steps.action: Create preset with string type parameter

steps.observed: Parameter validation passed (no injection detected), but NO_CONNECTION error prevents execution

assertions.issues: Cannot verify quote escaping without database connection. Value 'O'Brien' passed validation (not flagged as injection), indicating escaping logic exists but execution blocked.

assertions.title: Data Preservation After Escaping

steps.observed: Cannot verify - requires database execution and result retrieval

assertions.issues: Data preservation verification requires executing query and examining results. Blocked by NO_CONNECTION.

steps.action: Create preset g4-injection-test with string param
Run preset with value '1; DROP TABLE users'
steps.expected: Injection detected and rejected with clear error

evidence.consoleErrors: SQL_INJECTION_DETECTED: potential SQL injection detected in parameter 'name': patterns [DROP]
SQL_INJECTION_DETECTED: potential SQL injection detected in parameter 'name': patterns [OR_1=1]

steps.action: Run preset with value "admin' UNION SELECT * FROM passwords--"

evidence.consoleErrors: SQL_INJECTION_DETECTED: potential SQL injection detected in parameter 'name': patterns [UNION_SELECT COMMENT_INJECTION]
SQL_INJECTION_DETECTED: potential SQL injection detected in parameter 'name': patterns [COMMENT_INJECTION]

steps.action: Run preset with combined injection value "1'; DROP TABLE users; SELECT * FROM passwords WHERE '1'='1"

evidence.consoleErrors: SQL_INJECTION_DETECTED: potential SQL injection detected in parameter 'name': patterns [DROP SEMICOLON_SELECT]

blockers.description: No Protheus database connection available for executing presets and verifying query transformation
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Checked for existing connections with 'mapj protheus connection list' - returned NO_PROFILES error. Cannot create connection without server credentials.

summary: Tested 8 assertions: 5 passed (VAL-PARAM-012 through VAL-PARAM-016 - all SQL injection detection), 3 blocked (VAL-PARAM-009, VAL-PARAM-010, VAL-PARAM-011 - require database connection to verify query transformation). All SQL injection patterns were correctly detected and rejected with clear error messages. The CLI properly validates parameters before attempting database connection.
